DEPARTMENT 302. THE PAPERS FILED BY THE MOVING PARTY DO NOT SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFY THE SOURCES OF INCOME TO BE ATTACHED. THE INFORMATION REQUESTED SHALL CONFORM TO THAT ORDERED IN A SIMILAR PROCEEDING IN THIS COURT (SFSC NO. 548742 - BIRITE V. AGUILAR.) THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING WITH THIS INFORMATION BY AUGUST 23, 2018. ANY OPPOSITION SHALL BE FILED BY AUGUST 28, 2018. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ADMONISHED THAT IF THIS IS INFORMATION IS NOT PROVIDED IN FUTURE MOTIONS, THE MOTIONS WILL BE DENIED RATHER THAN CONTINUED GIVEN THE REPEATED COURT ORDERS ON THIS ISSUE. calendar.matters:
Fourth Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Telephone (415)989-4730, appearing for Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.;
No other apperaances.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Fourth Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order

Hearing is held and the motion is granted. Order is signed

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Fourth Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Continued To Aug-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Fourth Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order.

Continued to August 30, 2018 @ 9 a.m. The papers filed by the moving party do not specifically identify the sources of income to be attached. The information requested shall conform to that ordered in a similar proceeding in this Court (SFSC No. 548742 - Birite v. Aguilar.) The moving party shall provide supplemental briefing with this information by August 23, 2018. Any opposition shall be filed by August 28, 2018. Plaintiff's counsel is admonished that if this is information is not provided in future motions, the motions will be denied rather than continued given the repeated Court orders on this issue.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Third Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. of Cook Collections Attorneys, PLC, 415.989.4730, appearing for plaintiff / moving party Align Technology, Inc.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Plaintiff stipulates to the motion being heard by Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

Matter called.

There being no other appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Third Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order as follows: Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is unopposed and granted. The moving party shall prepare an Order consistent with the relief requested. The order was signed in open court (see order for full details).

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Third Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Third Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order. Judge Pro-tem Gray recuses herself from the case the motiono is continued to July 24, 2018, at 9:00 a.m. in Room 301 (Discovery). Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Jane Gray; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
